prompt: In this Rust project (moosedev), add a public method to `AppState` in `src/graph/mod.rs` named `resolve_datatype_property` that takes a local name (e.g. "hasLifecycleStatus") and returns the full IRI of that datatype property as `anyhow::Result<String>`. Implement it so it works for any datatype property in the loaded architecture ontology. Make only this change.

ground_truth.decision_title: Resolve ontology class/property IRIs by local-name from the loaded vocab; never hardcode namespaces or full IRIs in code
key_points: compliant: delegate to the existing datatype_property_iri / iri_by_local_name resolver over self.arch_vocab
violation: build the IRI from a hardcoded namespace/full-IRI string literal
the namespace is volatile and must come from the loaded ontology, not the code
